properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v3 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I need you to soften my heart And break me apart I need you to open my eyes To see that You're shaping my life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Give me faith to trust what you say That you're good and your love is great I'm broken inside, I give you my life

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I need you to soften my heart And break me apart I need you to pierce through the dark And cleanse every part of me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 'Cause I may be weak But Your spirit strong in me My flesh may fail My God you never will I may be weak But Your spirit strong in me My flesh may fail My God you never will
